data.title: A whale released 36,156 SOLs that had been pledged for a year, earning $1.51 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale has released 36,156 SOL (US$5.05 million) after staking for a year, making a profit of US$1.51 million. 
Previously, the address pledged 32,999 SOL on February 10, 2024, and made a profit of 3,157 SOL from staking.

data.title: Avalanche Foundation's three directors resign
data.description: Omer, a former director of the Avalanche Foundation, posted on the X platform that he confirmed that three directors, including himself, Aytunç Yildizli and Vikram Nagrani, had officially resigned from the board of directors of the foundation and its subsidiaries at the beginning of this week. Among them, Executive Director Aytunç Yildizli stopped performing his duties on February 28, 2025, and the board has been on the sidelines since then, trying to find a way forward. Omer said, "During the past 18 months of my tenure, Aytunç Yildizli, Vikram Nagrani and I have promoted a number of important tasks, including establishing the brand image of the Avalanche Foundation, publishing the first annual report, launching incentive programs such as infraBUIDL () and infraBUIDL (AI), and developing the AiFRED project. We are also committed to strengthening internal coordination within the ecosystem and shifting the focus of the growth strategy to new market development and strategic cooperation. This collective voluntary resignation decision is "well-considered", and we will continue to pay attention to the development of the Avalanche ecosystem in the future. I wish the Avalanche ecosystem and community all the best."

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bitcoin Price’s Bullish Pullback to End Soon, Says Analyst
data.description:
Bitcoin price fluctuations create market uncertainty, but investors detect hopeful signs in current market movements. It indicates a market breakout might be imminent according to historical market cycles. […]

data.title: Ethereum spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$23.0961 million yesterday, and the ETF net asset ratio reached 2.98%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 7, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Ethereum spot ETF was 23.0961 million US dollars.
Yesterday, Grayscale Ethereum Trust ETF ETHE had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical net outflow of ETHE is 4.128 billion US dollars.
Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF ETH had a single-day net outflow of 0.00 US dollars, and the current historical total net inflow of Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETH is 614 million US dollars.
As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETF is 7.762 billion US dollars, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Ethereum) is 2.98%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached 2.699 billion US dollars.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETF had a total net outflow of US$409 million yesterday, continuing its net outflow for 5 consecutive days
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, yesterday (March 7, Eastern Time), the total net outflow of Bitcoin spot ETFs was US$409 million.
Yesterday, Grayscale ETF GBTC had a single-day net outflow of US$36.4606 million, and the current historical net outflow of GBTC is US$22.421 billion.
Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF BTC had a single-day net outflow of US$0.00, and the current total historical net inflow of Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust BTC is US$1.086 billion.
The Bitcoin spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow yesterday was VanEck ETF HODL, with a single-day net inflow of US$619,600, and the current total historical net inflow of HODL reached US$828 million.
As of press time, the total net asset value of the Bitcoin spot ETF is US$98.483 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value to the total market value of Bitcoin) is 5.71%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$36.142 billion.

data.title: 1.10M Ethereum scooped up by whales—What do they know that we don’t?
data.description:
Ethereum whales accumulated 1.10 million ETH, sparking speculation about a potential market shift or breakout.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/1-10m-ethereum-scooped-up-by-whales-what-do-they-know-that-we-dont/

data.title: Crypto Activities Are Now Open to US Banks
data.description:
The U.S. Office of the Comptroller of the Currency (OCC) now allows national banks to engage in crypto activities without prior regulatory approval.
source: https://coincu.com/325638-crypto-activities-are-now-open-to-us-banks

data.title: Whales Acquire Over 30,000 BTC in Recent Weeks
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain analyst Ali reported on the X platform that whales have purchased more than 30,000 BTC over the past two weeks.

data.title: Kraken Exchange Prepares for IPO in the First Quarter of 2026
data.description:
Kraken exchange is preparing to go public as early as Q1 2026, aiming to become the second publicly traded U.S. crypto exchange after Coinbase.
source: https://coincu.com/325627-kraken-exchange-prepares-for-ipo
